title: Evan Ewing’s CV
text:
Business Analytics Student & AI Engineer

evanewing44@gmail.com | 801.888.7948 | LinkedIn Profile



August 2024 - December 2028 Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, Idaho

Bachelor of Science in Business Analytics (GPA: 3.951, Recipient of BYUI Merit Scholarship)
Minors: Finance, AI Engineering
Selected Coursework: SQL, Spreadsheet Applications, Spreadsheet Analysis for Business, Small Business Management, Operations Management
Academic Societies: Pre-Law, Speech and Debate, Professional Sales




Aug 2024 - Present Westhope Presbyterian Church, Remote Video Editor

Managed and organized media library of 700+ audio and video files, ensuring efficient access and workflow optimization
Edited 100+ videos in CapCut with clean audio, smooth transitions, and precise timing to boost quality
Uploaded 40+ podcast episodes and videos (1+ hour each) to YouTube and company site to grow visibility

Nov 2021 - Jul 2022 Cedar Crest Tire, Cedar Crest, NM Tire Technician and Driver

Performed 33 monthly inventory checks to ensure accuracy of stock levels, identifying and fixing multiple discrepancies
Collected over 7,000 tires from distribution centers by matching product numbers and sorted by size and brand in company basement
Replaced and repaired tires manually on more than 500 garbage trucks with steel tire bars, D-Handle High Torque Impact Wrenches, and tire hammers





AI prompt engineering
Editing Software
Leadership
Microsoft Excel
Problem-solving
Automobile/Machine Maintenance
Attention to detail
Sales and customer interaction
Structured Query Language
Organization





Developed custom AI, writes cover letters for job descriptions, matching relevant skills from user’s career, usually requiring less than 2 revisions for each
Designed custom AI, calculates effective kanban container size and quantity based on user’s inputs of demand and item dimensions with 90% accuracy
Won “The 800 Club” award for the Capsim manufacturing business simulator
Developed comprehensive Excel utilizing VBA macros and lookup functions to streamline volunteer assignments for local church
Earned MyEducator Microsoft Excel certificate
Built SQL 10-table database containing info for 300+ digital products and python web application to insert and fetch data from it
Planned business trips for owner of scholarship acquisition program startup business while on a student consultant team
Lectured at 5 Speech and Debate society meetings to university students on public speaking/presentation skills
